log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: 36/59
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: 22/59
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: 5/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist --- HP: 5/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dhampir — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.

→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist --- HP: 5/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 175/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 175/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: -19/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist --- HP: 37/59 | AC: 20

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
